title: Putting EU Foreign Policy into action to foster peace, security, and social cohesion in the Great Lakes region
content: The European Union (EU) has reaffirmed its commitment to peace and stability in the Great Lakes region through a recent mission to the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC).
snippet: The European Union (EU) has reaffirmed its commitment to peace and stability in the Great Lakes region through a recent mission to the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC).

title: Third EU-North Macedonia Horizon Europe Joint Research and Innovation Committee meeting
content: The third EU–North Macedonia Joint R&I meeting discussed the North Macedonian participation in Horizon Europe and latest policy developments.
snippet: The third EU–North Macedonia Joint R&I meeting discussed the North Macedonian participation in Horizon Europe and latest policy developments.

title: Commissioner Kos hosts third EU-Ukraine Business Summit
content: Today, Commissioner for Enlargement Marta Kos and Ukraine's Deputy Prime Minister for European and Euro-Atlantic Integration Taras Kachka will open the third EU-Ukraine Business Summit in Brussels.
snippet: Today, Commissioner for Enlargement Marta Kos and Ukraine's Deputy Prime Minister for European and Euro-Atlantic Integration Taras Kachka will open the third EU-Ukraine Business Summit in Brussels.

title: Commission recommendation to facilitate Power Purchase Agreement take-up
content: The Commission has today published a Recommendation on removing barriers to the development of power purchase agreements (PPAs) and other energy purchase agreements. PPAs comprise long-term bilateral contracts typically concluded between generators and corporate consumers.

title: Quality Assurance in Adult Education: Self-assessment and external evaluation

title: EU, Ukraine and Canada to co-host high-level meeting on returning Ukrainian children

title: Commission proposes full resumption of EU-Syria Cooperation Agreement

title: Commissioner Jørgensen in Spain to discuss ways to tackle the energy and housing crises

title: Commission advances cloud sovereignty through strategic procurement
content: This April, the European Commission awarded its Sovereign Cloud call for tender through which the EU institutions, bodies, offices and agencies (Union entities) will be able to procure sovereign cloud services for up to EUR 180 million over a period of 6 years.

title: EU and Iceland advance ocean cooperation at high-level dialogue in Reykjavik
